==== arrayObj.concat ====
Returns a new array consisting of a combination of two or more arrays.

  arrayObj.concat([item1[, item2[, . . . [, itemN]]]])

**Remarks**

The concat method returns an Array object containing the concatenation of **arrayObj** and any other supplied items.

The items to be added (item1 itemN) to the array are added, in order, from left to right. If one of the items is an array, its contents are added to the end of **arrayObj**. If the item is anything other than an array, it is added to the end of the array as a single array element.
